description_long: This is a rectangular, beige-colored cabinet with a flat top and three distinct vertical panels on its front face, separated by subtle grooves. The cabinet appears to be constructed from a solid material, likely wood or a wood composite, and has a smooth, matte finish. The sides are thin and taper slightly, giving the object a streamlined profile. There are no visible handles, knobs, or glass panels, suggesting a minimalist design, possibly for use as a storage unit or base cabinet in an urban environment. The back and top surfaces are plain, with no additional features or ornamentation. The overall appearance is functional and modern, suitable for placement against a wall or as part of a modular furniture system.
description: A beige, rectangular cabinet with three vertical front panels and a smooth, minimalist design. It has a flat top and no visible handles or glass panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical panels separated by grooves, with a flat top and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's thin, slightly tapered profile and solid construction.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain, unadorned surface with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the thin, tapered profile seen in view 1.
